notes: Residual diagnostics show championship-like early/middle underprediction but much smaller late-match bias.
The phase shift uses only the number of prior alliance rows observed in the same event, so it does not read future scores.
This is intentionally benchmarked against the defended residual-ridge default rather than promoted by tail intuition alone.
